overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical tribal settlement. She walks along dirt paths and wooden bridges, crosses a stream, and approaches a large ornate stone gate with golden detailing. The environment features wooden stilt houses, palm trees, and clear sunny weather.

events.description: transitioning from dirt path onto wooden bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the settlement buildings and central gate structure

entered.detail: large stone archway with golden decorative carvings and hanging lanterns
two-story wooden structure with stairs and red fabric awnings
tall palm trees lining the approach to the settlement
rustic wooden railing along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a dirt path toward a tribal settlement. A large ornate stone gate dominates the center distance, while wooden stilt houses and palm trees line the approach. The camera follows steadily as she transitions from dirt onto a wooden bridge structure.

events.description: character turns camera to look right at the flowing water below
NPC hand enters frame from right with interaction prompt visible

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and looking toward the stream below, approaching an NPC

notable_agents.action: extending hand toward Aloy with talk interaction prompt

entered.detail: flowing river with visible current and rocks beneath wooden bridge
small elevated hut with red roof near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks across a wooden bridge spanning a stream, the camera panning to show the flowing water below. The stone gate shifts to the left as she progresses. Near the end of the segment, an NPC's hand enters the frame from the right with a talk prompt, indicating an interaction opportunity.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path toward main settlement gate

events.description: character turns around to walk back toward the main gate area
stepping off wooden bridge back onto dirt ground

agents.ego_description: turning around on the bridge and walking back toward the main gate, passing the tribal house again

entered.detail: packed earth ground leading toward the gate entrance
tall reddish rock face behind the settlement buildings

segments.scene_description: After turning around, Aloy walks back across the bridge and transitions onto a dirt path. The stone gate, previously on the left, now looms directly ahead and closer. The environment shows the settlement's wooden architecture against a backdrop of tall stone cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: main settlement gate with ascending stairs

events.description: beginning to ascend wooden stairs toward the gate entrance
entering the shadow of the stone archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs toward the gate flanked by guards in purple robes

notable_agents.action: guard standing at gate entrance wearing purple robes and holding a staff
guard standing at gate entrance wearing purple robes

entered.detail: dark interior passage of the gate with bright exit light visible through the other side
ornate bronze lanterns suspended from the gate archway
blue-green fabric banners hanging from the gate structure

segments.scene_description: Aloy ascends wooden stairs toward the massive stone gate, flanked by guards in purple robes. She passes under hanging lanterns and turquoise banners as she enters the shadowy archway tunnel. The camera follows her through the gate structure as the scene transitions from bright sunlight to the darker interior passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open tropical approach into the shadowed interior of a fortified tribal settlement. It begins with Aloy walking along a dirt path lined with palm trees and stilt houses, moving steadily toward a distant, ornate stone gate before transitioning onto a wooden bridge. As she crosses the bridge over flowing water, the camera pans to reveal the surrounding environment until an NPC interaction prompts her to turn back toward the path. The scene then shifts as she advances directly toward the looming stone gate, framed by towering cliffs and wooden architecture. Finally, she ascends wooden stairs past guards in purple robes and under turquoise banners, moving from the bright sunlight into the dark, lantern-lit tunnel of the massive archway.
